goal: Pin the first daily card draw as the canonical Today card; subsequent draws on the same day no longer overwrite the localStorage slot.
affects: daily reading flow — today.js consumer, meowtarot.daily.cardOfTheDay localStorage slot
verified: write guard confirmed at reading.js line 2835-2849
off-limits files clean: css/styles.css, js/asset-resolver.js, js/common.js, share/*
Supabase saveReadingRecord path unchanged — both draws persist to readings table
filed: today.js does not validate slot date against current date before rendering — stale slot from a previous day would display until overwritten by the next draw. Separate concern, not blocking.
